mapper.insert: insert into table_view_share (id, table_name, table_type, tab_type) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tabType,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into table_view_share
id,
table_name,
table_type,
tab_type,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{tabType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update table_view_share
table_name = #{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
table_type = #{tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tab_type = #{tabType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: SELECT res.tabType,COUNT(res.subNum) as subNum,GROUP_CONCAT(res.subType) as subType FROM ( SELECT tv.tab_type as tabType, COUNT(DISTINCT tv.table_type) as subNum, CONCAT_WS('_',tv.table_type,COUNT(tv.table_type)) as subType FROM tab_type_info ty LEFT JOIN table_view_share tv ON ty.tab_name = tv.tab_type GROUP BY tv.table_type )res GROUP BY res.tabType ORDER BY subNum desc

SELECT ist.table_name as tableCode,ist.TABLE_COMMENT as tableName,COUNT(1) as fieldNum, ist.TABLE_ROWS as records, (CASE tv.update_type WHEN 1 THEN '每日更新' WHEN 2 THEN '每周更新' WHEN 3 THEN '每月更新' WHEN 4 THEN '每年更新' ELSE '无' END)as updateType FROM table_view_share tv LEFT JOIN information_schema.TABLES ist ON tv.table_name = ist.table_name LEFT JOIN information_schema.COLUMNS isc ON ist.table_name = isc.table_name AND ist.TABLE_SCHEMA = isc.TABLE_SCHEMA WHERE ist.TABLE_SCHEMA in ('putuo_base_data','crawler_base')
and ist.TABLE_COMMENT like CONCAT('%',#{tableName},'%')
and tv.table_type = #{tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
GROUP BY tv.table_name

SELECT COLUMN_NAME as fieldEngName, COLUMN_COMMENT as fieldCnsName, COLUMN_TYPE as fieldType, IS_NULLABLE as isNullAble FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE table_schema in ('putuo_base_data','crawler_base') AND TABLE_NAME = #{tableCode}

SELECT CONCAT('{',GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT_WS(':',CONCAT('"',COLUMN_NAME,'"'),CONCAT('"',COLUMN_COMMENT,'"'))),'}') as fieldCnsName FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE table_schema in ('putuo_base_data','crawler_base') AND TABLE_NAME = #{tableCode}
